highSimilarityPairs.leftText: An uncertain road asks for more than confidence. May patience, humility, and courage travel together.
highSimilarityPairs.rightText: You are allowed to begin before confidence feels complete. May humility and courage travel together.

highSimilarityPairs.leftText: You may feel both gratitude and sorrow for the same thing. May neither feeling be asked to leave.
highSimilarityPairs.rightText: You are allowed to feel relief beside sorrow. May neither feeling accuse the other.

note: Grammar and style findings are heuristic flags for human review, not automatic corrections.
